news.headline: Gabelli Utility Trust (NYSE:GUT) declares $0.05 monthly distributions per share for April, May, and June 2025. #finance
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Rye, New York, The Gabelli Utility Trust (NYSE: GUT) announced that its Board of Trustees has reaffirmed its commitment to paying fixed monthly cash distributions. The Board approved cash distributions totaling $0.05 per share for April, May, and June 2025.

news.headline: Airbnb to release Q4 earnings Thursday, analysts predict 58 cents per share profit and $2.42 billion revenue. Stock price up 4.5% to $140.52 on Wednesday.
news.summary: Airbnb, Inc. (NASDAQ:ABNB) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on Feb. 13 after the market closes. Analysts predict earnings of 58 cents per share, an improvement from a loss of 55 cents per share in the previous year. The company is expected to report a quarterly revenue of $2.42 billion, up from $2.22 billion a year ago. In the Q3 results announced on Nov. 7, 2024, Airbnb performed below expectations and gave a lower revenue forecast for Q4. On the day prior to the announcement, Airbnb's stock increased by 4.5% to $140.52. For more detailed information, readers can access the latest analyst ratings on the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

news.headline: Robinhood (HOOD) stock surges after Q4 report exceeds expectations: Revenue $1.01B, up 115%; EPS $1.01, surpassing estimates of 42 cents. Crypto rev soared 700%. Net deposits hit record $16.1B, funded customers up 8% to 25.2M.
news.summary: Shares of Robinhood Markets Inc (HOOD) saw an increase in trading on Thursday following the company's impressive financial report for Q4. The revenue for the quarter was reported at $1.01 billion, surpassing expectations of $944.62 million. Earnings per share for Q4 were $1.01, well above the estimated 42 cents. Total revenue showed a significant 115% increase compared to the previous year. Transaction-based revenue stood at $672 million, a surge of over 200% year-over-year. Equities revenue rose by 144%, options revenue by 83%, and crypto revenue by more than 700%.Robinhood noted a record net deposit of $16.1 billion in Q4, with a notable 8% increase in funded customers year-over-year, reaching 25.2 million. Investment accounts also witnessed a growth of 10%. Multiple analysts raised their price targets for Robinhood post the financial results, reflecting the positive sentiment in response to the report. The details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Reddit stock falls despite strong Q4 earnings and sales. User growth lags expectations after big rally.
news.summary: Despite reporting Q4 earnings and sales that exceeded expectations, Reddit's stock experienced a decline. The user growth of the platform was slower than anticipated after a significant rally. This news comes after a period where Reddit had seen a surge in popularity.

news.headline: Herc Holdings exceeds Q4 revenue estimates with 14.4% growth to $951 million, driven by $91 million rental growth. Adjusted EPS $3.58, below estimate. Adjusted EBITDA up 15% to $438 million. Net debt at $4 billion. CEO uncertain about 2025 landscape.
news.summary: Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HRI) posted a 14.4% year-over-year sales growth in the fourth quarter of 2024, totaling $951 million, surpassing the analyst consensus of $924.28 million. The revenue surge was fueled by a $91 million boost in rentals, derived from 2.1% pricing and 11.6% volume increases. Adjusted EPS climbed to $3.58 from $3.24, falling short of the estimated $3.94. Direct operating expenses increased to $324 million (38.6% of rental revenue) from $287 million (38.4%). Adjusted EBITDA rose by 15% year over year to $438 million, with the margin slightly increasing to 46.1% from 46.0%. As of December 31, 2024, net debt was noted at $4 billion, marking a 2.5x ratio.

news.headline: Zoetis stock drops 9% after missing 2025 guidance, despite beating Q4 metrics.
news.summary: On Thursday, shares of Zoetis experienced a significant drop by 9% following the release of its 2025 guidance, which fell short of expectations. Despite this, the company reported that its fourth-quarter metrics exceeded forecasts. The decline in Zoetis stock was notable in response to the disappointing 2025 guidance.

news.headline: Dutch Bros stock hits record high with 75% profit growth in Q4, surprising investors.
news.summary: Shares of Dutch Bros experienced a sharp increase on Thursday morning following the announcement of stronger-than-anticipated fourth-quarter earnings. The popular coffee chain saw its stock reach a new all-time high after reporting a remarkable 75% growth in profits. This significant jump in stock value highlights the positive reception of the company's financial performance among investors.

news.headline: Elon Musk rejects $400M Fed contract for 'Armored Tesla', DOGE may alienate consumers. Tesla stock rising.
news.summary: On Thursday morning, Tesla's stock witnessed a significant increase, building upon the growth it experienced on Wednesday. Elon Musk recently refuted claims of a $400 million federal contract for an 'Armored Tesla,' expressing concerns that involvement with DOGE may potentially distance consumers.

news.headline: Howmet Aerospace, a defense and commercial engine supplier, reports Q4 beat, guidance exceeding estimates, nears buy point.
news.summary: Howmet Aerospace, a provider of defense and commercial engines, revealed its fourth-quarter earnings and forecast exceeding expectations. The company's performance has led to it nearing a potential buy point, with a positive outlook indicated in its guidance and dividend increase.

news.headline: Hyatt announces $2.6 billion deal but tumbles on earnings miss; Wyndham reports mixed results after Marriott beats views.
news.summary: In a recent development, Hyatt revealed a significant resort deal worth $2.6 billion; however, the company faced a setback as it reported earnings below expectations, leading to a decline in its stock value. Concurrently, Wyndham announced mixed financial results. This announcement followed Marriott surpassing market expectations. The financial performance of these major hotel chains showcases a varied landscape in the industry.

news.headline: Preparation for Putin-Trump talks may take weeks or several months - IFax.

CNBC Washington Correspondent: I’m told the new tariffs President Trump announces today will NOT go into effect today. There will be a time delay of some months, possibly an April 1 start date. That’s still TBD. This will be a presidential memorandum today not an executive order, and USTR will be tasked with developing next steps.
Kōloa Landing Resort's Kaua‘i Poke Fest expands to two days on June 13-14, 2025 with a Poke Masters’ Table experience.
news.summary: Kōloa Landing Resort in Po'ipū, Hawaii, has revealed the extension of the popular Kaua‘i Poke Fest to span two days on June 13-14, 2025. Regarded as one of America's top ten food festivals, the event will commence with an exclusive celebrity chef experience called the Poke Masters’ Table. This will feature James Beard Award-winning Chef Sam Choy alongside other acclaimed guest chefs. The festival will proceed with the main event including a live poke competition, various tastings, and additional activities. The Kaua‘i Poke Fest is known for highlighting Hawaiian culinary traditions and is anticipated to draw large crowds.

news.headline: Kremlin: Ukraine will participate in talks.
PIN AI, founded by alumni from top universities, launches to protect personal data, prioritize individual needs over Big Tech.
news.summary: Today, PIN AI (Personal Intelligence Network) has been officially launched in San Francisco, with a goal to transform the way individuals manage, safeguard, and leverage their personal data. The company was established by graduates from Columbia, MIT, and Stanford universities. PIN AI is dedicated to encouraging the use of AI in a trustworthy manner through a clear framework that respects user choices. By focusing on individual requirements and refusing data consolidation, PIN AI guarantees that AI is used to benefit users rather than the agendas of major tech companies.

news.headline: Syniverse and Adobe partner for SMS messaging via Adobe Campaign, providing targeted and reliable messaging for global customers.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, global company Syniverse has partnered with Adobe (Nasdaq:ADBE) to integrate Syniverse's SMS messaging capabilities with the Adobe Campaign omnichannel marketing platform. This collaboration enables businesses to enhance the customer experience by sending targeted and personalized SMS messages worldwide in real time. The partnership aims to ensure the secure and reliable delivery of messages, optimizing engagement with customers.

news.headline: MediStreams had a successful 2024, achieving milestones with product innovation, client growth, and partnerships. CEO Coyle is pleased with the progress.
news.summary: In Roswell, Georgia, MediStreams, a prominent healthcare payment and remittance automation solutions provider, concluded a groundbreaking year in 2024. The company reached notable achievements in product advancement, client expansion, and strategic collaborations. Jim Coyle, CEO of MediStreams, described 2024 as a remarkable year for the company. Amidst challenges in the healthcare industry with manual processes and workforce deficiencies, the company saw significant success.

news.headline: Global fiber optical cable market to reach $108.73 bn by 2028, growing at 7.62% since 2018, led by Corning.
news.summary: A report titled "Fiber Optical Cable Market Opportunities and Strategies to 2033" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. As per the report, the global fiber optical cable market achieved a value of approximately $75.31 billion in 2023, indicating a growth rate of 6.84% since 2018. Forecasts suggest that the market will expand to around $108.73 billion by 2028, marking a growth rate of 7.62% from 2023. Subsequently, the market is projected to maintain a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.67% after 2028, leading to further growth.

news.headline: Putin and Trump call was a US initiative - Kremlin.
Kremlin: There's no decision yet on venue for the Putin-Trump meeting - Tass.
Dogecoin surged 218% in a year, outpacing Shiba Inu's 73%; Elon Musk references boosted DOGE in 2024.
news.summary: Over the last 12 months, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has demonstrated a remarkable performance, surpassing Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) in terms of gains. Dogecoin, the leading meme coin, has seen an impressive surge of 218% in the past year, outperforming Shiba Inu, which experienced gains of 73%. The upward trend for DOGE began in March 2024 and continued through late 2024, boosted by positive market sentiment, particularly driven by references made by Elon Musk related to D.O.G.E. On the other hand, Shiba Inu has been concentrating on enhancing its utility by implementing significant token burns and launching its metaverse in a bid to increase adoption. Despite these strategic efforts, the impact on Shiba Inu's performance is yet to be fully realized. For more details, please refer to the full story available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: UK Defence Secretary Healey: The UK is accelerating preparation and work on security guarantees for Ukraine.
Hunton Andrews Kurth LLP releases AI Act Guide to help businesses comply with EU's AI Act, the first legal framework for AI.
news.summary: A law firm based in New York, Hunton Andrews Kurth LLP, has announced the launch of a new resource on Feb. 13, 2025, called the AI Act Guide for In-House Lawyers. This guide aims to assist businesses in adhering to the regulations set forth by the European Union's AI Act, which is considered the global pioneer in comprehensive AI governance. The guide offers a detailed and user-friendly approach for companies to navigate the requirements laid out in the AI Act, providing valuable insights and actionable steps for compliance. It serves as a practical roadmap for businesses as they work towards aligning their AI practices with the legal framework established by the EU.

news.headline: Kinetic, a fiber-optic provider, surpasses 600,000 Whole-Home WiFi installs using RouteThis Certify.(Route: 600,000, Location: Kitchener, ON)
news.summary: RouteThis, a prominent player in WiFi customer experience solutions, based in KITCHENER, Ontario, has shared exciting news. Kinetic, a fiber-optic internet service provider, has achieved over 600,000 Whole-Home WiFi installations thanks to RouteThis Certify's advanced features. This achievement showcases the effectiveness of RouteThis Certify in assisting major Service Providers to enhance their WiFi installation procedures, obtain remarkable insights into the Quality of Install (QoI) data, and offer exceptional support to customers.

news.headline: UKG ranked #1 in Time & Attendance in 2025 Best in KLAS Awards, used by 70% of Fortune 1000 healthcare orgs worldwide.
news.summary: UKG, a top HR and payroll solutions provider, was named the best in Time & Attendance in the 2025 Best in KLAS Awards. The company is already a choice for 70% of Fortune 1000 healthcare organizations and holds the leading market share in workforce management globally according to NelsonHall. UKG is expanding its customer base in healthcare sector.

news.headline: Connection (CNXN) named one of Forbes America’s Best Midsize Employers for the third year in a row, based on workforce survey.
news.summary: A company based in Merrimack, New Hampshire, known as Connection (PC Connection, Inc.; NASDAQ: CNXN), a prominent information technology solutions provider for business, government, healthcare, and education sectors, has proudly disclosed its inclusion in the Forbes America’s Best Midsize Employers list for the third year running. This prestigious list, determined through workforce survey feedback, recognizes organizations that excel in creating a positive and engaging work environment. This acknowledgment signifies Connection's commitment to employee satisfaction and well-being.

news.headline: HPE ships first NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 with liquid cooling system.
news.summary: In Houston, Hewlett Packard Enterprise has revealed the arrival of its initial batch of NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 equipped with direct liquid cooling.

news.headline: Five MLSs and associations integrate Lundy's Navigator AI for improved member support, offering organization-specific answers from internal documents for smarter operations.
news.summary: In San Diego, Lundy Navigator offers tailored solutions sourced from internal documents of an MLS or association to streamline processes and decrease manual tasks.

news.headline: Lenders Cooperative and Ventures Lending Technologies merge in PA & San Diego, uniting to offer full lending solutions.
news.summary: In Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania and San Diego, a significant merger has been finalized between Lenders Cooperative and Ventures Lending Technologies. The merger has resulted in the formation of a consolidated entity specializing in commercial loan origination and servicing solutions. This move solidifies Lenders Cooperative’s standing as the top provider of technology and professional services for financial institutions across the country. The merged entity will provide enhanced capabilities to financial institutions, such as banks and credit unions.

news.headline: EnCharge AI secures over $100 million in Series B funding, bringing total funding to $144 million, to advance AI accelerator products for client computing.
news.summary: EnCharge AI, a Santa Clara-based startup, has successfully raised over $100 million in Series B funding for its innovative analog in-memory-computing AI chips. This brings the total funding for the company to more than $144 million. The latest round, which was oversubscribed, aims to propel the commercialization of EnCharge AI's initial client computing-focused AI accelerator products by 2025, as well as drive developments along the company's future product roadmap. Currently, the majority of AI inference technologies...

news.headline: Metronet brings ultrafast fiber-optic internet to Alexandria, Indiana with multimillion-dollar investment, offering speeds up to 5 Gbps for residents and 10 Gbps for businesses.
news.summary: Metronet, a leading internet provider labeled as America's fastest by PCMag for two years in a row, has revealed a significant financial commitment to Alexandria, Indiana. This multimillion-dollar project entails the installation of state-of-the-art fiber-optic infrastructure, ensuring lightning-fast internet access across the region. The initiative aims to serve numerous homes and commercial establishments, delivering unparalleled multigigabit speeds of up to five gigabits per second for residents and ten gigabits per second for businesses. This development signifies a milestone for Alexandria, promising enhanced connectivity and productivity.

news.headline: Let's aim to steer clear of a volatile market in the next four years.
news.summary: Over 100,000 people have been affected by the recent flooding in the state, with at least 20,000 homes damaged. The disaster relief efforts have provided aid to 50,000 individuals so far. The state government has allocated $10 million for immediate assistance and recovery operations. Emergency services have rescued 500 people stranded in flooded areas. The death toll currently stands at 30, with search and rescue missions ongoing.

news.headline: Finam in Russia offers notes linked to BlackRock Bitcoin ETF for qualified investors amid crypto regulation uncertainty.
news.summary: Finam, a brokerage based in Russia, has announced plans to provide structured notes linked to BlackRock's Bitcoin exchange-traded fund. The offering is specifically targeted towards qualified investors due to the uncertain regulatory environment surrounding cryptocurrencies in Russia. This move aims to leverage the increasing interest in Bitcoin and provide investors with exposure to this asset class through the structured notes offered by Finam. With this collaboration, investors will have the opportunity to participate in the potential growth of Bitcoin through a more traditional financial instrument.

news.headline: Visa Cash App Racing Bulls partners with Student.com for the 2025 season and beyond, aiming to create unique experiences for students.
news.summary: In Dubai, the Visa Cash App Racing Bulls have revealed a new partnership for the 2025 season and beyond. They have teamed up with Student.com, the world's biggest online student housing marketplace, which is a part of The Dot Group. This collaboration marks a significant move within the student sector, aiming to introduce unique experiences for a growing audience. The Dot Group is focused on improving the student economy worldwide. The partnership is set to bring innovative initiatives into the industry.

news.headline: Molina Healthcare aids L.A. County residents by creating Eaton Health Village post-wildfire; ongoing support.
news.summary: A partnership involving Molina Healthcare has contributed to the establishment of Eaton Health Village in Los Angeles County to aid residents affected by wildfires. The initiative aims to provide support as recovery efforts persist.

news.headline: Humana and Monogram Health expand kidney care program in Louisville, Kentucky.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky, Humana and Monogram Health have partnered to expand their comprehensive kidney care program. This collaboration aims to provide specialized care for individuals with kidney disease, offering a range of services to improve their overall health. This expansion will impact a significant number of individuals, increasing access to high-quality care and support for those dealing with kidney-related issues.

news.headline: Visana Health hires Dr. Chevon Rariy as Chief Clinical Innovation Officer and Mike Tudeen as Executive Chairman, aiming to expand care for 100% of women in the U.S.
news.summary: A virtual women's health clinic in Minneapolis, Visana Health, has appointed Dr. Chevon Rariy as Chief Clinical Innovation Officer and Mike Tudeen as Executive Chairman. This move is aimed at supporting the clinic's expansion and commitment to offering comprehensive medical care to all women in the U.S. Visana Health focuses on providing virtual-first evidenced-based care beyond just family planning, catering to the health needs of 100% of women.

news.headline: Howard Energy Partners has acquired equity interests in Midship Pipeline from Cheniere Energy, Inc. The 200-mile natural gas transmission pipeline connects SCOOP/STACK plays in Oklahoma.
news.summary: Howard Energy Partners (HEP) based in San Antonio has completed the acquisition of equity interests in Midship from a Cheniere Energy, Inc. subsidiary. The acquired asset is a 200-mile natural gas transmission pipeline regulated by FERC, situated in Oklahoma’s Anadarko Basin where SCOOP and STACK plays are active. Starting in Kingfisher County and ending near Bennington, Oklahoma, the 36-inch Midship Pipeline facilitates the transportation of natural gas from SCOOP/STACK regions.

news.headline: ShipStation releases 2025 Ecommerce Delivery Benchmark Report, offering insights for small businesses to compete in a slowing market.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, ShipStation, a prominent shipping and order fulfillment platform, has launched its much-awaited 2025 Ecommerce Delivery Benchmark Report. This report aims to assist small and mid-sized businesses in adapting to the intensifying competition within the market. With the maturation of ecommerce, growth rates are decelerating, while customer demands for efficient delivery and returns processes are escalating. The report outlines developing trends and offers recommendations to aid businesses in remaining competitive.

news.headline: BNB price jumps 8.14% to $698.58 in 24 hours, up 25% for the week. All-time high at $788.84.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of BNB (CRYPTO: BNB) surged by 8.14% to reach $698.58, reflecting a consistent upward trajectory observed over the preceding week with a notable 25.0% increase from $581.0 to its current value. The all-time peak for BNB stands at $788.84. The chart illustrating the price fluctuations and volatility of BNB can be found on the website.

news.headline: Waldom Electronics and Molex launch Mini Reel Program offering 450+ Molex parts to distributors, reducing lead times.
news.summary: In Rockford, Illinois, Waldom Electronics, a top Master Distributor of electronic components catering only to distributors, has collaborated with Molex to launch the Waldom x Molex Mini Reel Program. This innovative program offers Molex distributors more than 450 sought-after Molex components, including Board-to-Board, Wire-to-Board, and FFC-FPC connectors. These parts are readily accessible from stock in appropriately sized reels, eradicating lengthy lead times.

 transaction date: 2025-01-15 
 filed at date: 2025-02-12
Gala Music boosts artist rewards through Spotify integration, incorporating DSP streaming counts with $MUSIC tokens.
news.summary: Gala Music has revealed that they are reintroducing DSP's streaming counts, which will help increase artist rewards by utilizing Spotify's weighted distribution system with the use of $MUSIC tokens.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency market sees steep decline as Bitcoin (BTC) and altcoins suffer losses, prompting investors to cut losses in volatile conditions.
news.summary: The digital currency market has witnessed a drastic decline, with Bitcoin (BTC) and alternative coins suffering notable losses. Investors are realizing losses as market volatility persists.

news.headline: Sage Intacct introduces AI-driven tools for finance teams to save time & improve efficiency. AI helps save hours in month-end close, with customers having saved 3 million hours already. Finance leaders recognize AI as crucial for enhancing job satisfaction & strategic operations.
news.summary: Sage, a leader in accounting technology for small and mid-sized businesses, has announced new innovative AI-driven tools for Sage Intacct to help finance teams save time and focus on growth. Introduced in December 2024, Sage Copilot, a generative AI-assistant, now includes features like Search Help, Variance Analysis, and Close Assistant to streamline workflows and improve month-end efficiency. These enhancements have allowed CFO Christian Mulvihill at Greenidge Generation Holdings to cut processing times in half and reduce manual errors. According to Sage's report, 86% of finance leaders have incorporated AI into their operations, but only 49% use specialized AI solutions designed for finance. Sage is also expanding automation with features like AP Automation with Purchasing to help finance teams reduce manual effort and improve accuracy. These advancements have already saved organizations 3 million hours, allowing them to focus on strategic goals and growth. Dan Miller, EVP Financials and ERP Division at Sage, emphasizes the importance of giving businesses more time to focus on growth. Sage Intacct Release 1 2025 enhancements include these new AI-driven tools and automation features.

news.headline: Reveal expands Kosovo operations with AI innovation hub in Pristina, boosting global presence.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Reveal, a prominent global provider of AI-powered eDiscovery, review, and investigations platform, revealed an increased investment in its operations in Kosovo. This decision comes after experiencing remarkable growth and innovation over the past 18 months. Kosovo's strategic importance is evident as a vital hub for Reveal's European operations and worldwide AI-powered innovation endeavors. The establishment of the Kosovo 'Center of Excellence' in Pristina has been pivotal in this development. This center, situated in the heart of the capital city, serves as a focal point for the company's global operations.

news.headline: Honda cancels integration with Nissan, reports 8.9% sales growth. Merger aimed for August 2026 completion, creating world's third-largest auto group.
news.summary: Honda Motor Company, Ltd. (NYSE:HMC) saw an increase in share prices on Thursday following the release of their nine-month results. The company announced the end of discussions for business integration with Nissan Motor Co., Ltd. (OTC:NSANY) and disclosed the cancellation of the previously agreed upon memorandum of understanding (MOU) for integration. The merger plans, announced last December, were set for completion by August 2026. Both companies were also exploring the inclusion of Mitsubishi Motors in the consolidated entity. The successful merger would have positioned them as the world’s third-largest automobile group in terms of global sales volume. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US stocks edge higher with Nasdaq up 0.2%; Dow at 44,407.78 (+0.09%), NASDAQ at 19,690.91 (+0.21%), S&P 500 at 6,055.03 (+0.05%). Producer Prices up 3.5% in January.
news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. saw positive movement this morning, particularly with the Nasdaq Composite rising by around 0.2% on Thursday. After the market opened, the Dow increased by 0.09% to 44,407.78, the NASDAQ went up by 0.21% to 19,690.91, and the S&P 500 also saw a gain of 0.05% to 6,055.03. In terms of sector performance, consumer discretionary shares went up by 0.6%, while energy shares dipped by 0.4% during Thursday's trading. Notably, the Producer Price Index surged by 3.5% year over year in January, surpassing December's 3.3% and beating the forecast of 3.2%. This increase marks the highest annual reading since February 2023 and represents the fourth consecutive rise.
